question:
Rompuses are amenable. Rompuses are numpuses. Numpuses are brown. Numpuses are zumpuses. Every zumpus is bright. Vumpuses are nervous. Every zumpus is a dumpus. Every dumpus is sweet. Dumpuses are yumpuses. Every yumpus is not nervous. Yumpuses are jompuses. Jompuses are not liquid. Jompuses are impuses. Impuses are not small. Each impus is a tumpus. Tumpuses are not transparent. Tumpuses are wumpuses. Max is a rompus.

Is the following statement true or false? Max is not nervous.
